title: UV Tech Protectant and Rejuvenator Marine Scuba Diving Gear Care - 4 oz Clear
description:
UV Tech is a powerful protectant for use on hundreds of items including dry suit seals, kayaks, binocular housings, boat covers and a variety of outdoor fabrics and materials. Rejuvenates synthetic and natural materials and protects surfaces from sun damage and color fading. Restores gear to its original condition and prolongs gear life. Ideal for float tubes, waders & more. UV Tech Conditions, Seals and Protects Plastic, Vinyl, Rubber, PVC, Leather, Fiberglass, Hypalon and More.

UV Tech Protectant and Rejuvenator Marine Scuba Diving Gear Care - 4 oz Clear

UV Tech is a powerful protectant for use on hundreds of items including dry suit seals, kayaks, binocular housings, boat covers and a variety of outdoor fabrics and materials.

Key Features

  • Reduces Damage and Fading From The Sun.
  • Replaces Lost Plasticizers.
  • Protects For Easy Cleaning.
  • Improves Appearance, Enhances Color.
  • Nontoxic, Biodegradable, Nonflammable.

Product Specifications

  • MPN: mmeuvt4-489
  • UPC: 751321968493
  • Color: Clear
  • Size: 4 oz
